mapper.select:
select ap.id, ap.code, ap.name, ap.auth_methods as authMethodsText, ap.captcha_enabled as captchaEnabled, ap.mfa_enabled as mfaEnabled, ap.max_failure_count as maxFailureCount, ap.lock_minutes as lockMinutes, ap.status, ( select count(1) from realm r where r.auth_policy_id = ap.id ) + ( select count(1) from app_client ac where ac.auth_policy_id = ap.id ) as referenceCount, ap.create_time as createTime, ap.update_time as updateTime from auth_policy ap
ap.deleted = 0
and ap.name like concat('%', #{request.name}, '%')
and ap.code like concat('%', #{request.code}, '%')
and find_in_set(#{request.authMethod}, ap.auth_methods) > 0
and ap.status = #{request.status}
order by ap.create_time desc
select id, code, name from auth_policy where deleted = 0 and status = 1 order by create_time desc

select id, code, name, 'REALM' as referenceType, status from realm where auth_policy_id = #{authPolicyId} union all select id, client_code as code, client_name as name, 'CLIENT' as referenceType, status from app_client where auth_policy_id = #{authPolicyId}
select count(1) from realm where auth_policy_id = #{authPolicyId}
select count(1) from app_client where auth_policy_id = #{authPolicyId}
